evals.prompt: I want to add email notifications when a high-priority security alert is triggered in a company's tenant. Users are missing critical alerts and need to be notified outside the app.
evals.expected_output: A markdown plan file covering: what we're building, acceptance criteria with checkboxes, technical approach referencing the project stack (.NET + Azure AD + EF), implementation phases with concrete tasks, edge cases, and open questions. The plan should reflect answers to interview questions about recipient targeting, notification content, unsubscribe behaviour, etc.
expectations: A markdown file is created in the .claude/docs/brainstorm/ directory of the project
The plan includes acceptance criteria with checkbox items
The plan includes a phased implementation plan with checkbox tasks
The plan mentions the project's tech stack (e.g., .NET, Azure AD, email service, or EF)
The plan includes an edge cases or risks section
The interview asked at least one clarifying question before producing the plan

evals.prompt: I have an idea for letting users export their security incidents to a CSV or Excel file so they can share monthly reports with management.
evals.expected_output: A markdown plan covering: problem statement (reporting need), acceptance criteria, technical approach (API endpoint, file generation, what columns/data to include, permissions), implementation plan, and edge cases around large datasets, multi-tenant data isolation, and permissions.
expectations: A markdown file is created in the .claude/docs/brainstorm/ directory of the project
The plan includes acceptance criteria with checkbox items
The plan addresses what data/columns to include in the export
The plan mentions tenant isolation or permissions to ensure companies only export their own data
The plan includes a phased implementation plan with checkbox tasks
The interview asked at least one clarifying question before producing the plan

evals.prompt: brainstorm an audit log feature — admins should be able to see who did what in the security center, like who changed a policy or dismissed an alert
evals.expected_output: A markdown plan covering: what events to log, data model for audit entries (actor, action, target, timestamp), API design, frontend display, retention policy, and implementation plan. Should reflect the multi-tenant architecture.
expectations: A markdown file is created in the .claude/docs/brainstorm/ directory of the project
The plan includes acceptance criteria with checkbox items
The plan includes a phased implementation plan with checkbox tasks
The plan discusses what events or actions to capture in the audit log
The plan considers the multi-tenant architecture (per-company audit logs or scoping)
The interview asked at least one clarifying question before producing the plan
